summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be fully implemented. The HeroSection now uses absolute positioning with inset-0 so the background image extends to the top of the viewport behind the header, and the Header component now displays 'Delicious Mexican Food' as the center tagline, uses the useScrollDirection hook to hide on scroll-down and reappear on scroll-up, while preserving all other header elements.
